creator: bartsch@dssgmbh.de
text:
after some minutes the build process hangs after showing the following output:

gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/prod/tmp/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO310_m11/dmake'
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/prod/tmp/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO310_m11/dmake'

dmake has been successfully built

dmake copied to /prod/tmp/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO310_m11/solenv/unxfbsdx/bin/dmake
build -- version: -

rmdir /tmp/70580
build -- version: -

=============
Building module instsetoo_native
Running processes: 1
/prod/tmp/usr/ports/editors/openoffice.org-3/work/OOO310_m11/instsetoo_native/inc_openoffice/unix
mkout -- version: 1.8
dmake:  Error: -- Missing number for -P flag
Running processes: 0

How-To-Repeat: run make in openoffice.org-3 (same behaviour in an amd64 environment)
